chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: Welcome to 100 days of code

chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life

chunks.text: When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made PLAS applications and did a lot of freelancing

text: Welcome to 100 days of code Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life When I was in 2nd year of college, I knew C++ very well I was doing coding, I knew coding, I knew HTML But I was not able to work in any industry May be I was not getting any C++ project Now I am not saying that C++ is a bad programming language I have made many conditional related programs with the help of C++ I have done many other things like making a calculator But I was not able to work in any industry When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made PLAS applications and did a lot of freelancing I consider Python as a language which taught me the use of programming Why do we give so much value to programming in the industry and why is programming used so much in the industry In today's video, I am going to show you some programs which you will enjoy watching You will also say that it is fun to watch these programs Because after watching these programs, you will understand the actual use of programming Why is programming used? I will tell you 5 programs today and you will also enjoy watching them Some of them are very amazing games There is a Jarvis virtual assistant which works on your map It shows you what you say and what commands you give The biggest reason to make this course is that there are many new things in Python There are many new approaches which I want to tell you This brand new course will touch all those things For example, there is a valrus operator in Python There are many other additions There are many easy ways to do things We will cover all these things in this course I will teach you Python so well that you can run Python while programming a snake on your map You can do whatever you want Let's go to the showcase and I will show you my programs which I made with the help of Python Let's get started The first program I want to show you is Jarvis virtual assistant This program takes your commands and after taking your commands it does some work As you can see, it has opened YouTube It is a very cool program You give a command and it completes the task The next program I want to show you is our love calculator It is an amazing calculator which shows how much love there is between two people Obviously, it will not accurately show how much love there is between you and your partner You all know that But in a fun way, we made this program using a random module If we put two names, it will show the love percentage Let's try it out I will put Harry in the name and I will put Payal in the name of the partner I calculate 97% Great Now, let's say I write here Let's say I write Sanskriti here So, 0, 3, 3% It means I should stay away from girls named Sanskriti Boys named Harry So, this is a very fun calculator I hope you will enjoy running it The next program I want to show you is the face recognition program Which uses the Harkascade algorithm Basically, it tells in an image where the face is Where is the face This is a face detection algorithm So, here you will see in the face of Robert Downey Jr. It will tell where the actual face is hidden The picture will tell where the face is hidden So, I run it for 1.jpg file You can run it on your favorite file So, I run it here After running, you see it has detected all the faces from this image So, I can run it for different images It is not necessary that it will work for one image It is working for different images It was a very fun program It was fun to make it Our next project is the Flappy Bird game Which is probably someone Someone who has not played this game Basically, it is a very good game We play a lot on our phones But here you can play a game made by your hands on your computer Flappy Bird I can play it See, I am playing it here And it will be fun to play it See here So, fifth Last but not the least I have made many other projects But this is something I want to showcase How to make a snake game in Python I will play this game and show you As you can see This is our black snake This is our red food I know it can be done better By changing the image But here I made logic And see I am playing it I will break the high score of 90 I can make a lot of scores I will tell you Friends, I am a very dangerous hardcore gamer You can see here The score is 90 I don't want to get out I want to get out See, I made the score of 100 It's fun It's fun to play a game made by your hands I just want to tell you So, in the coming videos We are going to do something like this I will tell you before And you will enjoy a lot Because we will not make only these projects We will make a lot of such projects In which we will be converting our ideas into reality Now I am going to give you all this code I want you to run all these codes in your system Whether you are able to run or not That is a different thing But run them All the modules I have imported above You guys install them by installing pip If not now Then when we go to the module chapter Install pip and run them again If you are not able to run them I hope you guys don't have any problem In running them And if not Then we will gradually progress in this course You come back to this program And see what was the mistake I got no module error So can I fix it? Can I run it again? It's not like you have to do everything in this video I hope you guys will enjoy In taking these five programs You guys keep them with you And as we learn We will move forward in things Python programming We will learn more You guys will do it more easily and well All these programs I am giving you here All the five programs Which I have shown you They are present here You guys can run them on your machine And you guys will enjoy a lot Some of them are using windows api So it will run in windows Like javis virtual assistant You guys can do it in mac or linux But we will do this thing When we will move a little further in the course You guys run all these programs And you guys will enjoy But don't try to recreate them now Don't think that I have learned so much python And I will make them from scratch And change things in them If you guys do this Then you guys will get a little bit of frustration Because what you don't know You will try to do that thing So that's not a good idea So we will make all these things I will make dangerous programs than this So you guys just give me a little time Keep this 100 days of code journey And you guys are going to enjoy So this is the link of rappel You guys will get it in the description And one more thing I would like to tell you And that is If you guys have not accessed the python 100 days of code playlist Then access it now Because all the videos are going to be in this playlist And if you guys bookmark this playlist And don't save Then you guys might miss some days I don't want you to miss any day Bookmark this playlist And in the coming days We are going to do a lot of things Enjoyable Till then you guys take care of yourself And I will see you next time Outro
